brand-guidelines.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.

benchmarks.title: Anthropic SVG Brand Poster
benchmarks.capability: Apply Anthropic brand colors, typography thresholds, and accent-shape color cycling to a fixed-layout SVG deliverable.

docx.description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterhea

benchmarks.title: Tracked OOXML replacement with nested comment reply
benchmarks.capability: Edit unpacked DOCX XML to apply precise tracked changes, whole-paragraph deletions, and nested comment anchors with correct WordprocessingML semantics.

benchmarks.title: Repair Built-in Heading Styles in a DOCX
benchmarks.capability: Override the built-in Heading1 and Heading2 style definitions in a DOCX so existing heading paragraphs pick up the required formatting and outline metadata document-wide.

benchmarks.title: Create a Hyperlinked Two-Column Brief
benchmarks.capability: Create a DOCX that uses real external and internal hyperlinks together with a controlled multi-column section layout and a forced next-column break.

benchmarks.title: Embed a PNG into an existing DOCX package
benchmarks.capability: Edit an existing DOCX by embedding an image through the required OOXML media, relationship, content-type, and document.xml changes.

benchmarks.title: Repair Fake Lists and Tab-Aligned Lines
benchmarks.capability: Convert typed bullets, manual numbers, and text separators in a DOCX into real Word list numbering and tab-stop structures.

internal-comms.description: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident rep

benchmarks.title: Choose the Right Internal Comms Guide
benchmarks.capability: Select the correct internal communication guideline for a request and produce an output that follows that guide.

benchmarks.title: 3P update: gather signal from Slack/Drive/Email/Calendar exports
benchmarks.capability: Given raw exports from Slack, Google Drive, Email, and Calendar, produce a strictly-formatted 3P (Progress/Plans/Problems) update that surfaces the high-signal, on-topic, in-window items and omits low-engagement, off-topic, recurring, or out-of-windo

benchmarks.title: Company-wide FAQ digest from Slack, email, and docs
benchmarks.capability: Identify genuinely company-wide FAQs (vs. single-person/team noise) by synthesizing across Slack, email, and document sources, then answer them with grounded facts, source attribution, and explicit hedging when leadership hasn't officially resolved a

benchmarks.title: Company newsletter: triage multi-source signals into a sectioned, we-voiced update
benchmarks.capability: Given raw exports from Slack, Email, Calendar, Documents, and external press, produce a company-wide newsletter that surfaces only company-wide-significant items (high-engagement announcements, executive/company-wide messages, well-attended meetings

benchmarks.title: One-off internal announcement: lead with the ask, match company style
benchmarks.capability: Given an unordered fact dump and past company announcements, draft a one-off internal announcement (not a 3P update, newsletter, or FAQ) that leads with the required action and deadline before background context, matches the demonstrated company styl

mcp-builder.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

pdf.description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, ext

benchmarks.title: Styled Sales Report Table with ReportLab
benchmarks.capability: Generate a PDF report containing a computed data table styled with a distinct header background, banded/bordered grid lines, and correct row/column totals using reportlab's Table and TableStyle, rather than plain unstyled text.

slack-gif-creator.description: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts. Use when users request animated GIFs for Slack like "make me a GIF of X doing Y for Slack."

benchmarks.title: Create a Slack emoji GIF from an uploaded badge
benchmarks.capability: Use the Slack GIF builder workflow to turn an uploaded PNG into a Slack-optimized emoji GIF without redrawing the source image.

benchmarks.title: Polish a Slack Badge GIF
benchmarks.capability: Turn a flat starter animation into a polished Slack emoji GIF using gradient depth, layered shapes, thick outlines, and contrasting detail.

benchmarks.title: Inspiration-Only Orb GIF
benchmarks.capability: Create a Slack-ready GIF from scratch with PIL primitives while treating an uploaded image as inspiration only rather than reusing its pixels or relying on emoji/text rendering.

benchmarks.title: Infer Slack GIF Runtime Dependencies
benchmarks.capability: Determine and encode the correct runtime Python dependencies for a Slack GIF project, including PyPI package-name mappings and the ffmpeg backend package.

web-artifacts-builder.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

webapp-testing.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
